strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP)
Strong problem-solving and architecture skills across multiple languages and domains
concerns: Limited recent experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)

Primary stack (Nest.js, Vitest) not prominently used in listed recent projects
response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack credentials with TypeScript/Node.js and significant AI-agent experience, but his recent work shows limited engagement with the primary stack (Nest.js, Vitest). His broad polyglot background is impressive but may distract from deep specialization in the required technologies.
